close_reason: Extracted duplicated lazy client init into ensure_client() method
description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:96-107 and 144-155. Identical 12-line OnceCell init block (try_default, map_err Unavailable, await, clone). Extract to async fn client(&self) -> Result<kube::Client, SecretError> on K8sBackend. The closure passed to get_or_try_init does not need to capture self, so the helper has no lifetime trickery.
title: Lazy client init is duplicated in get() and put()
